_comment: Example default application/json response for GET /v1/agents/{aid} when no DID-specific Accept header is used.

_notes.content_type: Returned with Content-Type: application/json unless the client requests application/did+json or application/did+ld+json.
_notes.did_document: DID-specific Accept headers return the generated DID Document instead of this metadata object.
_notes.grant_tier: Relying Parties use this persisted grant_tier during Step 9d Grant Tier Conformance validation.
